page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance, measured via stress-ng and Geekbench, falls into the bottom 25%, with single-threaded gzip compression showing poor results in the bottom 10%. However, the 32 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance across stress-ng, PassMark, and Geekbench tests. Memory bandwidth remains stable in the middle 50% tier, reaching 99.19 GB/sec for large-block uncached reads and 49.44 GB/sec for writes.

Given the high memory density and average multi-core throughput, this instance is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads such as database operations, Redis caching layers, and multi-threaded data processing. It is less optimal for tasks highly dependent on single-threaded execution speed. The hardware profile offers a qualitative cost-efficiency advantage for applications requiring substantial memory capacity without the premium cost of high-frequency single-core processors.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon 8269CY vCPUs running at 2.5 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, it delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, though it lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Baseline network bandwidth is rated at 6 Gbps. Benchmark data reveals a tradeoff: single-core performance is relatively weak, falling in the bottom 25%, whereas multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics consistently rank in the average tier. This makes the instance highly cost-efficient for memory-bound, multi-threaded workloads. It is best suited for database hosting, Redis caching, and parallelized data processing tasks that prioritize memory capacity over raw single-threaded CPU speed.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and a 6 Gbps network baseline, designed for memory-intensive multi-threaded workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1ne.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, built for database and caching workloads.
tagline: A memory-dense virtual server offering balanced multi-core performance and high RAM capacity for database and caching workloads.

256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Average multi-core and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Optimized for databases, Redis caching, and multi-threaded tasks
No local storage or GPU hardware included
